input.content:
Calculate the QED for this compound.

CCCCCCCCCCCCCNCC(=O)N(CCCCN)CC(=O)N(CC(N)=O)Cc1ccco1

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be a single floating point number.

Count the valence electrons in total (including hydrogens) in the molecule below. Provide a whole number.

O=C1CC(C[C@H]2CCCO2)=NN1c1cccc(F)c1Cl

Respond with a single integer inside a box, like this: \boxed{answer}, and nothing else.

Does this compound meet Lipinski's Rule of Five (MW ≤ 500, HBD ≤ 5, HBA ≤ 10, logP ≤ 5)?

Cc1cc(C(=O)N(c2ccccc2)c2ccc(O)cc2)cn1-c1ccc(Br)cc1C(=O)N1Cc2ccccc2C[C@H]1CN1CCN(C)CC1

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be 0 or 1. (1 = yes/passes, 0 = no/fails)

Does the following molecule contain an amide group (C(=O)N)?

OCc1cccc(-c2ccc3ncc(-c4cccc(CO)c4)n3n2)c1

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be 0 or 1. (1 = yes/present, 0 = no/absent)

How many total aliphatic carboxylic acids or carboxylates (Al-COOH, Al-COO-) in this molecule? Provide a whole number.

CCOc1ccc(-n2c([C@@H](C)N(C(=O)Cc3ccc(F)c(C(F)(F)F)c3)C3CCN(C(C)=O)CC3)nc3ncccc3c2=O)cc1

Respond with a single integer inside a box, like this: \boxed{answer}, and nothing else.

Compute the molecular weight (in g/mol, using average atomic masses) for this compound. Give a numeric value.

CSCC[C@H](NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1c[nH]c2ccccc12)NC(=O)[C@H](CC(N)=O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCCN)NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(N)=O)NC(=O)[C@H](CO)NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(N)=O)NC(=O)[C@H](CCC(=O)O)NC(=O)[C@H](C)NC(=O)[C@H](CCCNC(=N)N)NC(=O)[C@H](CC(C)C)NC(=O)[C@@H](NC(=O)[C@H](CCCCN)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccc(O)cc1)NC(=O)[C@H](Cc1ccccc1)NC(C)=O)[C@@H](C)O)C(C)C)C(=O)N[C@H](C(=O)N[C@@H](CCC(=O)O)C(=O)N[C@H](C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(C)C)C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(C)C)C(=O)N[C@H](C(=O)N[C@@H](CCC(N)=O)C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(N)=O)C(=O)N[C@@H](C)C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(N)=O)C(=O)N1CCC[C@H]1C(=O)N[C@@H](CC(=O)O)C(=O)NCC(=O)N[C@@H](CSCC(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(C)=N)C(=O)N[C@@H](CCCNC(=N)N)C(N)=O)C(N)=O)C(C)C)[C@@H](C)O)[C@@H](C)O

Provide your reasoning for the answer and state the final result. Your final answer (and only the answer) must be enclosed in double parentheses. The final result should be a single floating point number.
